content.en:
"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, do you also want to enter the Forbidden Void Realm?"

Seeing that Ye Tian was about to go in, the Wind King asked.

"Hmm, although I am only the strength of the Sixth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it is difficult for the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor to kill me!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Wind King also knew that Ye Tian had a great adult-level forbidden body, and he also had a forbidden weapon, so his life-saving ability was naturally very strong, and he couldn't be treated as an ordinary top sixfold Heavenly Dao ancestor.

"Be careful!" the Wind King reminded.

He didn't know if Ye Tian had come to the main body or a clone, so it was a good thing to remind him.

Ye Tian entered this small forbidden void realm, but before entering the forbidden void realm, he looked in the direction of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but saw a person-

Long Fei Dao Ancestor!

Ye Tian had already investigated the people of the Feng family where the Emperor Fengyang of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was located, and the ancestor of the Feng family was the ancestor of the Long Fei Dao.

"Feng Family Ancestor, Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

If it was some powerful Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, Ye Tian didn't have any confidence in killing them, but Long Fei Dao Ancestor was relatively weak among the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and belonged to the kind of Dao Ancestors who barely used some special secret techniques to forcibly break into the realm of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and their potential was almost exhausted.

Such a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was not strong in combat power, and it was very flawed.

However, after all, the other party was a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and it would be difficult for him to kill the other party, and it would take a long time.

"Let's talk about it first, and then kill him if we have a chance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

------------

Forbidden Void Realm.

A famous Dao Ancestor came in, they were basically Dao Ancestors above the Fifth Heaven, and Dao Ancestors below the Fifth Heaven did not dare to come in, otherwise the mortality rate would be too high.

Of course, most of them are still Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

These Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors basically came from the Upper Triple Heaven forces, and a few were scattered cultivators.

As soon as all the Dao Ancestors entered, they scattered separately, for fear of being surrounded and killed by others.

"The rules here are so strong, the space is too solid!"

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he felt the rules here and muttered.

And this is still a small forbidden void realm, and the rules are not perfect, so you can imagine how powerful the rules of the real medium-sized forbidden void realm are.

No wonder it can be said that the Invincible Dao Ancestor or even the Half-Step Domain Ancestor can't shake the Forbidden Void Realm, once he controls a Forbidden Void Realm, it is basically equivalent to having a safe rear.

The Forbidden Void Realm was relatively empty because it had just been born, and many areas were in the form of whirlpools, as if they were pregnant with certain continents and stars.

It's like the real world!

Many Dao Ancestors have begun to look for continents and planets that have been born, and only there will forbidden and strange things be born.

After a while, the Dao Ancestors disappeared, and Ye Tian also chose a direction to fly away at random.

He couldn't kill Long Fei Dao Ancestor in a short period of time, so there was no need to stare at Long Fei Dao Ancestor, it was better to look for some forbidden strange things first.

When the Forbidden Void Realm was just born, there were indeed a lot of forbidden strange things.

No, Ye Tian didn't fly long before he discovered a Void Continent.

Wow!

Above the Void Continent, Ye Tian descended here.

As soon as his divine sense swept away, he found many forbidden and strange things.

"About thirty forbidden and strange things!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

It was so easy to find more than thirty forbidden and strange objects, which was much easier than finding them one by one.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's gaze turned into the distance and looked at a Dao Ancestor who was flying at a high speed.

Judging from the aura, the other party is a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, which is not too powerful.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian held the forbidden spear and threw it fiercely.

In the distance, the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor saw the forbidden spear stabbing at him, and after resisting it with all his might, he kept retreating.

And he recognized Ye Tian's identity, he was the top Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he had a great adult-level forbidden body, which was not something he could offend.

So, he's gone!

Seeing that Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor leaving, Ye Tian sped up to collect these forbidden and strange things.

His inner world has long been captive with a group of forbidden bloodline creatures, and now it is just in time to release the great terror caused by the attraction of forbidden strange things.

Of course, not all forbidden and strange things contained great terror, so Ye Tian did not let many forbidden bloodline creatures be wasted.

In a short time, Ye Tian took away all the more than thirty forbidden strange objects, and then left here.

After Ye Tian left, a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor came here, and seeing that there were no forbidden strange things on this Void Continent, he couldn't help but sigh with regret and continued to fly away.

That's it.

The forbidden strange things in the forbidden void realm were taken away by the Dao Ancestors one by one, and occasionally some Void Continents containing a large number of forbidden strange things attracted a number of Dao Ancestors, and the Dao Ancestors fought wildly, just to snatch the forbidden strange things.

If it is a low-level forbidden strange thing, it is not worth fighting for the Dao Ancestors.

But many of the forbidden strange things born in the Forbidden Void Realm are medium forbidden strange things, and there are also many high-level forbidden strange things, and even the top forbidden strange things are not very rare.

If you're lucky, you might even find a forbidden treasure!

this day.

Ye Tian was looking for forbidden strange things, and at this time he had already obtained nearly thousands of forbidden strange things, including dozens of top-level forbidden strange things, and the harvest could be described as very rich.

Abrupt.

There were bursts of battle fluctuations in the distance, and the aura was very chaotic, obviously a number of Dao Ancestors were fighting.

"Check it out!"

Ye Tian flew over.

Soon, he saw the battle in action.

About hundreds of Dao Ancestors were snatching a giant tree, only to see that the giant tree was cut into pieces, and each branch of the giant tree flowed with drops of black substance, exuding a forbidden aura.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply, and his eyes were full of excitement and greed.

If he hadn't guessed wrong, that giant tree would have been a very rare and almost legendary forbidden spirit root!

Heaven and Earth Spirit Root is almost the best cultivation resource treasure, for example, some divine medicine also belongs to a kind of Heaven and Earth Spirit Root, and there are also forbidden spirit roots among the forbidden treasures, they are the best cultivation treasures, which can greatly improve cultivation.

For example, Ye Tian's current cultivation of the Nine Extremes Dao Classics also needs to slowly accumulate forbidden Dao power, and there is no way to achieve it overnight.

But the forbidden spirit root is different, it can make Ye Tian's forbidden dao power grow rapidly, saving countless years of penance.

Once you have obtained the Forbidden Spirit Root, as long as the potential is sufficient, you will soon be able to increase your strength.

For example, if a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who had just been promoted had obtained a forbidden spiritual root, although it was hopeless to impact the Supreme Dao Ancestor, he would be able to step into the extreme level of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in a short period of time.

"Rob!"

Ye Tian decided.

He also has to snatch the forbidden spirit root, even if he can only snatch a part, he can greatly improve the forbidden Dao power, and with his potential, he can quickly break the shackles and be promoted to the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he doesn't need to slowly cultivate for a long time before he can be promoted to the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.
